name: n8n
description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities, 400+ integrations, visual builder, self-hostable. Includes MCP client and server nodes.

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

pm_override.reason: PM override: 49 injection findings confirmed FP by SecM — n8n Guardrails node contains jailbreak DETECTION code, not attacks. 16 obfuscation findings are String.fromCharCode in spreadsheet encoding + i18n locale fixtures.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 13150 files analyzed. Found: 5 network, 4 file, 40 env, 1 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 2583 findings: 49 critical, 976 high, 1043 medium, 515 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 2583 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
